prompt: Create an interactive screen flow diagram for a mobile food delivery app: Home Feed (list of restaurants) → Restaurant Detail (menu items) → Cart (order summary) → Checkout Form (address + payment) → Order Confirmation. Show the wireframe mockups for each screen with appropriate content (cards for the feed, hero image for detail, form fields for checkout). Include back navigation on each screen.
expected_output: A standalone HTML file with D3.js rendering 5 mobile screen mockups as wireframes connected by green action pills. Each screen should show type-appropriate wireframe content. Back navigation arrows should be present. Screens should have rounded corners, drop shadows, and green connector lines.
